summary: The input batch underwent rigorous processing according to the 8 scholarly protocols. Several words were identified as merged and subsequently split: 'ባህሪያትበግሌ' into 'ባህሪያት' and 'በግሌ'; 'በዬቤቱና' into 'በዬቤቱ' and 'ና'; 'የሚተሳሰሩና' into 'የሚተሳሰሩ' and 'ና'; 'ወደየቤቱና' into 'ወደየቤቱ' and 'ና'; 'መጨለምና' into 'መጨለም' and 'ና'; and 'ሊጠጣና' into 'ሊጠጣ' and 'ና'. The conjunction 'ና' (and) was consistently discarded from the dataset due to Protocol 7, which mandates the removal of single-character words or roots. Two words, 'ጆሮጅ' and 'ጂናን', were discarded as unfixable gibberish or likely foreign proper nouns that do not contribute to a general Amharic lexicon. A visual OCR correction was applied to 'እወዳጆች', which was corrected to 'ወዳጆች' as the initial 'እ' appeared to be an extraneous OCR artifact. Scholarly guesses were made for 'ፕሮጀክቶቻ', treating it as a noun derived from 'ፕሮጀክት' despite its potentially incomplete form, and for 'ማነሻነት', where 'መነሻ' (noun) was selected as the root to best represent the word's semantic function. For 'በዬቤቱ' and 'ወደየቤቱ', the core noun 'ቤት' was identified as the root.

The input batch was processed through all 8 scholarly protocols. Several words containing prefixes and suffixes were split to extract the core dictionary entry. Specifically, 'ከኮምፒውተርና' yielded 'ኮምፒውተር', 'ለኢንዱስትሪዎችም' yielded 'ኢንዱስትሪ', 'ክንድማ' yielded 'ክንድ', 'ይገጥማትም' yielded 'መገጠም', 'በሞኒተሪንግና' yielded 'ሞኒተሪንግ', 'ሄደዋልም' yielded 'መሄድ', and 'በሕልሞቹ' yielded 'ሕልም'. Scholarly Guesses were made for visual OCR corrections: 'እንሚያመልጡ' was treated as 'እንዲያመልጡ' to derive the root 'ማምለጥ', 'ኑሯዋቸውን' was corrected to 'ኑሯቸውን' for the root 'ኑሮ', and 'በሚያዋስኑዋት' was interpreted as 'በሚያዋስኗት' for the root 'ማዋሰን'. All extracted roots are at least two characters long, adhering to the size constraint. Punctuation was stripped, and only semantically valuable words were retained.

The input batch underwent a rigorous 8-protocol analysis. Several words were split to isolate their core semantic components, such as 'ከጨረሱማ' into 'ጨረሱ' and 'ማ', and 'ጅማቶችዋ' into 'ጅማት' and its suffixes. Common prefixes and suffixes (e.g., 'ከ', 'ለ', 'ም', 'ና', 'ዎች', 'ውን', 'ዋ') were discarded as they do not form standalone dictionary entries. A visual repair was performed on 'መፐዋወዛቸው', correcting 'ፐ' to 'ወ' to form the valid 'መዋወዛቸው'. Scholarly guesses were made for 'እቅጠል', identifying 'ቅጠል' (leaf) as the most probable noun root given the context of 'ማርገፏ' (shedding), and for 'ደፍሞ', inferring its root from 'መደፈር' (to dare/violate). Proper nouns like 'ሙሳኪልዳ', 'ዛንካዳ', 'አሊፖ', 'ዊንጌት', 'ቶሌዶ', 'ሞንቴ', and 'ሳሌርኖ' were identified and treated as nouns. All words included in the dataset are at least two characters long, adhering to the size constraint. No words were deemed unfixable gibberish or semantically meaningless enough to be entirely discarded.

The input batch was processed through all 8 scholarly protocols. No words required splitting (Protocol 1). No words were discarded as unfixable gibberish (Protocol 2). Minor visual repair was applied to 'ባህሪይውም' which was corrected to 'ባህሪውም' for its root 'ባህርይ' (Protocol 3). All words were successfully lemmatized to their global citation form (infinitive for verbs, base noun/adjective for others) (Protocol 4). Comprehensive English synonyms were provided (Protocol 5). Each word was assigned a major Part of Speech tag (Protocol 6). All words met the minimum length requirement of two characters (Protocol 7). 'ኒስካኔንን' and 'ኢስቶሚን' were identified as proper nouns, with the '-ን' accusative marker stripped for the base form.

The input batch underwent a rigorous 8-protocol scholarly analysis. Several words were identified as merged and subsequently split: 'አካፍለዋልና' into 'አካፍለዋል' and 'ና'; 'ልቡናዊም' into 'ልቡና', 'ልቡናዊ', and 'ም'; 'በማስተርጐምና' into 'መተርጐም' and 'እና'; 'ሃርፐርንና' into 'ሃርፐር' and 'እና'; 'አለመማርና' into 'መማር', 'አለመማር', and 'እና'; 'በአሳሳችና' into 'ማሳሳት', 'አሳሳች', and 'እና'; and 'ካልታወቁና' into 'ማወቅ', 'አልታወቁ', and 'እና'. No words were discarded as pure gibberish or single characters, as all provided some semantic or functional value. A scholarly guess was made to correct the OCR error in 'ወስብስብ' to the more common and correct 'ውስብስብ'. Transliterated proper nouns and loanwords such as 'ባክግራውንድስ', 'ክሊንስማን', 'ሃርፐር', 'አርቪንት', 'ፓቺንኮ', 'ማሀዴያ', 'ፓራዴሸ', 'አብሪያን', and 'ሃይድልቤርግ' were identified and tagged as Nouns. Morphological analysis was applied to derive infinitive roots for verbs and base forms for nouns and adjectives, ensuring the global citation form. Part of speech tagging adhered strictly to the specified major categories. All roots and derived forms met the minimum two-character length requirement.

The input batch underwent a rigorous 8-protocol analysis. Several merged words were identified and split: 'ነውእኔም' into 'ነው' and 'እኔም'; 'አይደለሁበጣም' into 'አይደለሁ' and 'በጣም'; 'ሁላችንአውቀን' into 'ሁላችን' and 'አውቀን'; 'ባንፈጽምምአውርተን' into 'ባንፈጽምም' and 'አውርተን'; 'ባንሠራምሰምተን' into 'ባንሠራም' and 'ሰምተን'; 'ባናሰማምበጣም' into 'ባናሰማም' and 'በጣም'; and 'ሲፒጂና' into 'ሲፒጂ' and 'ና'. The single-character word 'ና' was discarded as per Protocol 7. A scholarly guess was made for 'መሌብ', correcting it to 'መልበስ' based on common morphological patterns and semantic context. Transliterated animal names (ኦፖሶም, ካኦላስ, ውምባት, ባንዲኮት) and geographical terms (የታዝማኒ) were processed, with 'ካኦላስ' lemmatized to its singular form 'ካኦላ'. The word 'በረዷቸው' was lemmatized to 'መብረድ' (to freeze/cool) based on the most probable semantic interpretation of the verb form.

The input batch was processed through all 8 scholarly protocols. Two merged words were identified and split: 'ያለውሳኔ' into 'ያለው' and 'ውሳኔ', and 'ጌታነህልክ' into 'ጌታነህ' and 'ልክ'. Several visual OCR confusions were corrected, specifically 'መፅሄቱዋ' to 'መጽሔቷ', 'የገዛሁዋት' to 'የገዛኋት', 'ይፈርዋታል' to 'ይፈሯታል', and 'የፈጣሪአቸው' to 'የፈጣሪያቸው'. No words were discarded as gibberish or unfixable noise, and all words/roots were longer than a single character. Scholarly guesses were applied to the split of 'ጌታነህልክ', interpreting 'ጌታነህ' as a proper noun (name) and 'ልክ' as a noun meaning 'measure' or 'exact', as 'ጌታነህልክ' is not a recognized single Amharic word. The interpretation of 'ወዳሰኛቸው' as 'ወደ አሰኛቸው' (to where he named/deemed them) is based on common Amharic grammatical structures.

that it will not be signed

and (that it will not be signed)
the one she was not in

so that I may tell him
so that I may not show

summary: The input batch was processed through all 8 scholarly protocols. No words required splitting. No words were discarded as gibberish or unfixable noise; all were deemed to have semantic or functional value, including several proper nouns. Visual OCR repair was applied where necessary, specifically for 'ትመለስሁ' which is a common OCR corruption of verb endings. This was interpreted as a form of 'መመለስ' (to return), with the specific conjugation (e.g., 'she will return' or 'I will return') being a scholarly guess based on common usage patterns for such corrupted forms. All words were successfully lemmatized to their infinitive or base noun/adjective form, translated with comprehensive synonyms, and tagged with their major Part of Speech. All words met the minimum two-character length requirement.

The input batch underwent a rigorous 8-protocol scholarly analysis. Several words required splitting, correction, or scholarly guessing to derive their canonical forms. 

**Splits Performed:**
- 'ሙስጠፋና' was split into 'ሙስጠፋ' and 'ና'.
- 'ውዝግብበፀጥታ' was split into 'ውዝግብ' and 'በፀጥታ' (rooted to 'ፀጥታ').
- 'ከሚማርኩኝና' was split into 'ከሚማርኩኝ' (rooted to 'ማረክ') and 'ና'.
- 'እንዲወጡላችውና' was split into 'እንዲወጡላችው' (rooted to 'መውጣት') and 'ና'.
- 'ሔደውበግዞት' was split into 'ሔደው' (rooted to 'መሄድ') and 'በግዞት' (rooted to 'ግዞት').
- 'ከመፈታታቸውም' was split into 'ከመፈታታቸው' (rooted to 'መፈታት') and 'ም'.
- 'ተጠናቀውም' was split into 'ተጠናቀው' (rooted to 'መጠናቀቅ') and 'ም'.
- 'የመደፍረስና' was split into 'የመደፍረስ' (rooted to 'መደፍረስ') and 'ና'.
- 'በጉብኝቷም' was split into 'በጉብኝቷ' (rooted to 'ጉብኝት') and 'ም'.

**Scholarly Guesses & Corrections:**
- 'ስማችንንን' was corrected to 'ስማችንን' (cleaned word) and rooted to 'ስም', treating the extra 'ን' as an OCR error/typo.
- 'እግዜሔር' was corrected to the standard spelling 'እግዚአብሔር'.
- 'መነጋገ' was identified as an incomplete word and rooted to the infinitive 'መነጋገር'.
- 'የመታረቂውያውን' was corrected to the more plausible 'የመታረቂያውን' and rooted to 'መታረቅ', considering 'ውያውን' as an OCR anomaly.
- 'ፊልቴር' was corrected to the standard transliteration 'ፊልተር'.
- 'ያስተማሪ' was rooted to the base form 'አስተማሪ'.
- 'ተከራይተ' was identified as an incomplete word and rooted to the infinitive 'መከራየት'.
- 'እየጠየቀቻች' was identified as an incomplete word and rooted to the infinitive 'መጠየቅ'.

**Words Discarded (Protocol 7 - Single Character Filter):**
- The conjunctions 'ና' and 'ም' were discarded as their root forms consist of only a single Amharic character, violating the minimum two-character length requirement for inclusion in the dataset.

Processed 30 input tokens. Discarded 'እህህሀህሀ' and 'እህሀደጉንም' as noise/gibberish. Split merged tokens like 'ሲያወሩኝና' into 'ሲያወሩኝ', 'ተግዳሮቱበዓለም' into 'ተግዳሮቱ' and 'ዓለም', and 'ስያሜበውጭው' into 'ስያሜ' and 'ውጭው'. Corrected 'ዮናስስ' to 'ዮናስ'. Standardized roots to infinitive forms.
